articles.title: ‘Like lighting the guitar on fire,’ Robby Roadsteamer’s path to internet fame goes deep into MAGA country
articles.description:
Rob Potylo’s rowdy alter ego has amassed a huge online following by trolling Trump supporters.

The post ‘Like lighting the guitar on fire,’ Robby Roadsteamer’s path to internet fame goes deep into MAGA country appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Robby Roadsteamer, alter ego of Rob Potylo, gains fame by trolling Trump supporters online.
Potylo's online persona has attracted a significant following, impacting local cultural discussions.
His actions highlight the divide in Boston's political landscape, resonating with many residents.
